dtsPropsFor.Hero:
/** Primary CTA handler. Omit to use the site default, which scrolls to the on-page calculator (`#calculator`) and falls back to `/#calculator`. */
  onInvest?: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void;
dtsPropsFor.ImpactBand: /** No props — a full-width stat band with the portfolio's canonical figures baked in. */
dtsPropsFor.MktNav:
/** Handler for the nav's "Invest now" button. Defaults to scrolling to the calculator. */
  onInvest?: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void;
dtsPropsFor.MktFooter: /** No props — site footer with the brand lockup, link columns and legal line baked in. */
dtsPropsFor.ThemeToggle: /** No props — flips `data-theme` on `<html>` between 'light' and 'dark' and persists to localStorage. */
dtsPropsFor.HomeCalculator:
/** Handler for the calculator's "Start investing" CTA. */
  onStart?: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void;
dtsPropsFor.ReturnComparison:
/** Handler for the CTA under the comparison bars. */
  onInvest?: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void;
dtsPropsFor.Opportunities: /** No props — the four-vehicle opportunity grid, content baked in. */
dtsPropsFor.Opportunities2: /** No props — the expandable "Compare the opportunities" table, content baked in. Rows expand in place. */
dtsPropsFor.IntakeForm: /** No props — the lead intake form. Posts to Tenth Avenue via a hidden iframe; renders under `id="get-started"`. */
dtsPropsFor.Partners: /** No props — the partner/verifier logo wall. Swaps colour and white marks by theme. */
dtsPropsFor.SocialProof: /** No props — the credibility band: metrics, verifier logos and press mentions. */
dtsPropsFor.Insights: /** No props — the Digest teaser grid of recent editorial posts. */
dtsPropsFor.Process: /** No props — the four-step "From capital to keys" explainer. */
dtsPropsFor.Testimonial: /** No props — a single pull-quote block with attribution. */
dtsPropsFor.BeforeAfter: /** No props — the before/after rehab comparison. Ships placeholder slots until real photography is supplied. */
